name: Tabasco (Mexico)

colors.symbolism: the field and details of the arms

description: A white field with the coat of arms of the state of Tabasco centred.
history: Tabasco has no officially adopted state flag; the design shown — a white field bearing the state coat of arms — is in de facto use to represent the state.

features.symbolism: A white field charged with the state coat of arms, in the typical pattern of Mexican state flags.
The arms reference the Olmec heritage, the rivers (Grijalva and Usumacinta), the tropical landscape, and the Spanish colonial foundation of the state in the 16th century.
